name: Grapefruit Aspic
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the gelatin in 1/2 cup of the water.
2. In a saucepan, stir together the remaining 1/2-cup water and sugar over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Dissolve the gelatin in the sugar mixture and cool.
4. Add the grapefruit juice, lemon juice, sherry, and salt.
5. Pour the mixture into an oiled 9-inch ring mold and chill until firm.
6. Turn out on a platter and garnish with grapefruit sections.
